content: Vegans need to consume 1 gram of protein per pound of body weight to support muscle function.
Plant proteins generally lack all 9 essential amino acids compared to animal proteins.
Vegans can accumulate amino acids throughout the day without combining proteins with every meal.
Vegans are deficient in Omega-3 fatty acids, leading to an excess of Omega-6 fatty acids and potential inflammation.
Seaweed supplements containing DHA can help vegans increase their Omega-3 levels.
